text: There is a sense of curiosity welling inside me. In this place, glass walls reveal a meeting or classroom—a modern temple of knowledge, or perhaps innovation. The design and technology-inspired environment evoke both anticipation and slight detachment. As I stand at the threshold, I am aware of my role as observer and participant, hovering between inclusion and distance. The nearby wall of text and visual storytelling hints at research and development—a space where ideas are exchanged and futures shaped. I feel an intellectual buzz, but also the existential question: am I merely witnessing, or on the verge of joining something transformative?
